     the Fermi energy is    -0.4346 ev

!    total energy              =  -11738.29835208 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.9E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08756945 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11738.21078263 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -238055.76957561 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  120128.01244616 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4203.05771960 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  110395.61247077 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.00840435 Ry

     total magnetization       =    42.02 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    52.77 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  32 iterations
